\tzpentry{ID5855}{Quantum Casimir Stress-Energy Tensor}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5855 introduces Quantum Casimir Stress-Energy Tensor as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} T_{\mu\nu}^{Casimir} = -\frac{\hbar c \pi^2}{240 d^4} \text{diag}(1, -1/3, -1/3, -1/3) \end{equation}
